headline: Cruise Karens 🛳️😷 Quarantined in Nebraska Hanta-Drama 😱🐀 LOW RISK LMAO 😂
text:
US cruise peeps 🛳️🇺🇸 getting the FULL ZOOMER quarantine glow-up 😷🔒 in Nebraska's ONLY national slammer 🏰🚫, while CDC daddies 👨‍⚕️📈 scream 'PUBLIC RISK VEEEEEERY LOW' like it's no biggie 🍆😏! MV Hondius 🚢🇳🇱 Dutch daddy ship docked in Spain's Canary Islands 🏝️🌴 had ONE Yankee testing POSITIVE for ANDES HANTAVIRUS 🐀🔥 – rare rodent rodeo strain that needs PROLONGED SMOOCHES 💋😷 to spread, not your average flu bro! First confirmed American case 🦅💥, but Admiral Brian Christine from HHS dropping truth bombs 💣📢: 'CRYSTAL CLEAR, no Rona 2.0 ORGY here!' 😂🧪

18 Yanks EVAC'd 🚀✈️: 16 chilling in Omaha's biocontainment bunker � altitude 🏔️😤 with Gov Jim Pillen yelling 'NO RISK SIMPS WALKING FREE ON OMAHA STREETS!' 🛣️🚷💦. They're in 'GOOD SHAPE & SPIRITS' like they're at a spa day 🧖‍♂️🍹, no symptoms, just extra cautious cuz PCR tests be flirty 😘🧬 – one mildly positive specimen from ship vibes, but US re-tests say HOLD UP! 🕵️‍♂️🔬 Michael Wadman MD spilling tea ☕: 'Let 'em SLEEP 👀💤 then ASSESS!' Maybe 42-day full quarantine grind ⏳😩 or case-by-case bounce 🏃‍♂️🚪.

Atlanta squad 🛫🇬🇪 snagged the symptomatic cutie 😷💕 + their boo for monitoring, preserving Nebraska space like pros 🧹📦. Cali kontingent 🌴🍑: TWO in Nebraska watch, TWO homebirds told 'STAY PUT & NO HANGZ' 🏠🚫 – ZERO symptoms, ZERO cases, just vibes check! Meanwhile, Canuck crew 🍁🗺️: SIX total, FOUR back in BC/Yukon via chartered jet ✈️🇨🇦 self-iso 21-42 days 🚫🤝, ONTARIO couple cozy at crib 🏡😴 no symps per Health Minister Sylvia Jones 💅📋.

TRAGEDY twist 😢💔: THREE DEAD from Hondius hantapocalypse ☠️🐀, WHO confirms TWO hantavirus victims, plus Brits in Netherlands/South Africa confirmed cases 🇬🇧🏥🌍. British-US dualie locked in Nebraska too 👀🦅🇬🇧! Over 90 peeps repatriated worldwide 🌍🛳️, but experts yeet person-to-person fears cuz most hanta = RODENT ONLY 🚫👤, Andes the clingy ex needing close contact cuddles 🤗😷. Brendan Jackson CDC: 'Mild cold? STILL QUARANTINE, WE EXTRA PARANOID AF!' 😤🦠 No streetside spread, bbs – chill like it's Omicron who? 🚀😂 Wall Street Karens sweating stocks 📉😰? Nah, this hanta bubble POPPED before it blew 🫧💥!

Nebraska Gov flexing 🏋️‍♂️: 'We're the QUARANTINE QUEENS 👑😷!' Cali reporters Shaimaa Khalil spilling deets 📰🌴. Passengers BRRRR-ing in good spirits 🥳💨, waiting for symptom watch – will they moonshot outta there 🚀🍑 or full 42-day Netflix binge? 🎥⏳ Hanta-hype OVER, public SAFE like Jensen's NVDA jacket 🧥🔥!
